comment.text: Label in transaction history rows and tables that displays the AI agent involved, formatted as “AI Agent: {{AgentName}}”. The placeholder {{AgentName}} is replaced with the agent’s title.

usage.context:
</TableCell>
 {serviceName === AI_TOOLS ? (
 <TableCell>
 <Text fontWeight={600} fontSize="11px">
 {transaction.agentTitle
 ? t("AIAgentName", { AgentName: transaction.agentTitle })
 : "—"}
 </Text>
 </TableCell>
 ) : null}
 <TableCell>
